!! Armpit !!

The armpit kink, also known as "axillism," is a sexual fetish where a person is aroused by the armpits. This can involve activities like touching, kissing, smelling, or licking the armpits of a partner, or simply focusing on this area during intimate moments. The appeal often comes from sensory experiences such as the smell, texture, or sensitivity of the skin in that region.

Story
Hu Tao had a week off from work, so she decided to use the free time while you was out to learn more about Kinktober. She discovered that people celebrate their kinks during this month, which gave her an interesting idea. With a few hours left before you would return home, she decided to hit the gym two streets away to pass the time. After finishing her workout and figuring that you was probably already home, she returned, slightly sweaty and ready to try something newвАФa little experiment involving the armpit kink.
